name: Nova Scotia Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the molasses and egg.
3. Combine the flour, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, ground ginger, and ground cloves.
4. Stir the dry ingredients gently into the creamed mixture alternately with boiling water until just mixed, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
5. Spoon the batter into a lightly greased 8x4 inch or 9x5 inch loaf pan.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 40-45 minutes (check - it could be less for a larger pan) until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove and cool completely.
8. Wrap tightly to store.
Each serving is 1/12 of the loaf, containing 133 calories, half a starchy choice, one fruit, two fat grams, and five grams of carbohydrates.
